summary: Set 068 Session 5 of 6: Contract-test / CDC gate -- the deterministic verification FLOOR. Ran on claude-opus-4-8 high (the S4 routed next-orch rec was claude-sonnet-4-6/high; the operator launched opus and it was kept). BUILT the gate that Experiment A's H4 (~95% of seeded defects are deterministically falsifiable) supports and that the S4 routed-DEMOTE decision's transition guard waits on (routed stays MANDATORY until this gate is live + stable; S6 wires the gating predicate and flips the default). DESIGN (contract-gate-design.md): deliberately MIRRORS the Set 066 path-aware-critique gate's produce->validate shape so an operator who knows one knows the other -- a per-set contractGate attribute (none|advisory|required; spec-seeded, recorded once at set start to activity-log.json under its own kind, immutable, default none), a manifest (contract-manifest.json: the operator-authored contract/falsifier argv + the seeded/known defect classes with probeable flag + coveredBy tests), a floor result (contract-floor-result.json: the RAW exit+output of running the manifest command in the Set 068 S1 disposable run_test cage -- the cage's first production consumer), and a posture-agnostic close-out validator. Chose produce->validate (NOT run-tests-live-in-close_session) so close-out stays deterministic + fast + never-wedges; the PRODUCER (python -m ai_router.contract_gate run) runs the floor in the S1 cage, the close-out gate validates the saved result. COVERAGE RULE: gate ok iff valid identity-matched manifest + every probeable class names >=1 covering test (floor carries the bulk) + a valid identity+command-matched floor result that PASSED (ran AND exit 0 AND not timed-out AND worktree torn down); the non-probeable residual is REPORTED as reserved for the path-aware agent, never a failure. SHIPPED: ai_router/contract_gate.py (policy-attr machinery, manifest + floor-result pure-Python validators per L-066-1 -- type-check optional fields + int-not-bool/float for schemaVersion, floor producer, validate_contract_gate, CLI run/validate) + __init__ exports; close_session.py wiring (set-terminal, required hard-TTY/soft-headless, advisory always-soft, none skip, fail-open, corrupt-activity-log loud warning -- mirrors the Set 066 block exactly); router-config.yaml comment anchor (no behavioral flag flipped); docs/contract-gate.md + 2 JSON schemas + 2 example fixtures. TESTS: 93 (test_contract_gate.py unit, test_contract_gate_close.py close_session integration mirroring test_path_aware_critique_close_gate.py, test_contract_gate_schema.py JSON-Schema<->pure-Python parity per L-066-1). VERIFICATION: cross-provider via gpt-5-4 (different provider than the opus orchestrator; MANDATORY per the S4 transition guard, incl. this session's own close-out), up-front conventions block per L-064-10. R1 ISSUES_FOUND 1 Major (a malformed-but-JSON-parseable activity-log -- top-level [] or entries-not-a-list -- could make the policy readers raise past their never-raises contract and silently disarm a required gate) -> fixed via a shared _read_activity_entries shape-guard. R2 ISSUES_FOUND 2 Majors ((1) UnicodeDecodeError -- a ValueError but not a JSONDecodeError -- escaped the guard on invalid UTF-8 bytes; (2) non-dict items inside entries were silently filtered as a clean no-record) -> both fixed (catch UnicodeError; flag ANY non-dict element as corruption while keeping reads tolerant; writer refuses a corrupt log) + 9 hardening tests. R3 VERIFIED clean. ai_router pytest suite GREEN (1641 passed / 1 pre-existing skip; baseline 1548 + 93). NO release (S6 ships the PyPI release + dogfood + close). OUT OF SCOPE by design (S6): wiring the blast-radius gating predicate that flips per-session routed to gated, the verification-surface synthesis doc, and any Explorer/extension UI. FOLLOW-UP NOTE for S6: the same malformed-activity-log robustness gap the verifier caught here is LATENT in the sibling readers ai_router/path_aware_critique.py (read_path_aware_critique / has_path_aware_critique_record / path_aware_critique_record_unreadable) and ai_router/dedicated_verification.py (read_verification_mode / has_verification_mode_record) -- they catch only OSError/JSONDecodeError and assume dict/list shape; consider porting the _read_activity_entries shape-guard to them in S6 or a future hardening pass (left unchanged here to keep S5 additive and within its Touches scope). Metered ~$0.442 (verification R1 $0.182 + R2 $0.160 + R3 $0.099 + next-orch $0.003). next-orch routed=claude-sonnet-4-6/medium (S6 is synthesis + docs + the predicate-wiring + an irreversible PyPI release + dogfood).

reason.specifics: Routed analysis (route task_type=analysis) recommends claude-sonnet-4-6/medium for Session 6 ('Synthesis + docs + release + dogfood + close'). S6 is doc-and-release-heavy with one genuine implementation piece: author the verification-surface SYNTHESIS doc (tying Exp A + re-grade + Exp B + the routed DEMOTE decision + the contract gate into one strategy, superseding the Set 065 open questions); WIRE the blast-radius/coupling gating predicate that flips per-session routed verification to GATED + flip the workflow default (the S4 transition guard's cut-over step -- touches close_session/workflow, real blast radius -- so design it against the diff-inspection seam this set established); update ai_router/docs/ (run_test cage + contract gate) + docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md; bump ai_router + ship the PyPI release per the publish runbook (green-Test-on-the-tagged-SHA prerequisite, operator pushes tag v*; IRREVERSIBLE -- follow the runbook exactly); change-log.md; route the next-SET rec; DOGFOOD (pathAwareCritique=required -> produce this set's own path-aware-critique.json via the manual flow or the Set 067 producer); close. sonnet-4-6/medium is the cheapest-CAPABLE choice for runbook-driven release + well-defined doc updates + supervised predicate wiring, reserving gpt-5.4/gemini-pro for the mandatory cross-provider verifier role (different provider than the orchestrator). CAVEATS for the S6 operator: (1) this is the session that actually CUTS OVER the routed demotion -- read routed-fate-decision.md sections 3-4 before wiring the predicate; until the cut-over lands, per-session routed stays mandatory. (2) Consider porting the S5 _read_activity_entries malformed-activity-log shape-guard to the sibling readers in path_aware_critique.py + dedicated_verification.py (same latent gap, left unchanged in S5 for scope). (3) The PyPI release carries Sets 067 (0.21.1) onward + this set; confirm the version bump + green Test on the tagged SHA before the operator pushes the tag.
